nasb.text: The Jews then were astonished, saying, “How has this man become learned, having never been educated?”

esv.text: The Jews therefore marveled, saying, “How is it that this man has learning, when he has never studied?”

cnv.text: 猶太人就希奇，說：“這個人沒有學過，怎會通曉經書呢？”

ccb.text: 犹太人感到惊奇，说：“这个人没有受过教育，怎么懂得这么多呢？”

csbs.text: 那些犹太人感到惊奇，说：“这个人没学过，怎么懂得经文呢？”
